page_metadata.biotools__summary: GPHMM (Global Parameter Hidden Markov Model) is a novel statistical method dedicated to identify copy number alteration and loss of heterozygosity (LOH) in tumor samples using whole genome SNP arrays.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GPHMM (Global Parameter Hidden Markov Model) is a novel statistical method dedicated to identify copy number alteration and loss of heterozygosity (LOH) in tumor samples using whole genome SNP arrays.
